description: A portrait-format bar chart on a dark blue background faintly showing a border fence. The title reads Southern Border Apprehensions by U.S. Border Patrol. Five vertical bars are labeled by year from 2021 to 2025. The 2021 through 2024 bars are red with values 1,662,167, 2,214,652, 2,063,692 and 1,577,319; the much shorter 2025 bar is green and labeled 237,538. Large italic text near the bottom reads Lowest since 1970, with a U.S. Customs and Border Protection wordmark and a small White House emblem at the foot.
notable_text: Southern Border Apprehensions by U.S. Border Patrol; 2021 1,662,167; 2022 2,214,652; 2023 2,063,692; 2024 1,577,319; 2025 237,538; Lowest since 1970
